holdings.infoBox: XSD is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are MaxLinear stock at 5.74%, Marvell Technology at 4.91%, Astera Labs at 4.61%, Intel at 3.87%, and Advanced Micro Devices at 3.83%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Semiconductor ETF (XSD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Semiconductors Select Industry index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of semiconductor stocks. XSD was launched on Jan 31, 2006 and is issued by State Street.
